overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, elevated highways, and flying vehicles. The footage showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections and vibrant neon signage characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

approaching the elevated highway structure ahead

tall modern street light illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-slicked urban intersection at night, with the BD SHACK building's prominent red neon signage visible on the right. The camera moves forward across the wet crosswalk, reflecting the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings, approaching an elevated highway structure in the distance.

camera begins tilting upward to view the skyline and flying vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive elevated highway structure while observing the surrounding neon architecture

towering buildings covered in bright red and blue neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the massive elevated highway structure, where the lighting shifts to a mix of neon underglow and deep shadows. As the camera progresses forward, it begins tilting upward to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon advertisements against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyline view with flying vehicles and mega-buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a stunning cyberpunk skyline with flying vehicles navigating between massive neon-lit skyscrapers. A prominent hotel sign with Japanese characters glows blue on the left as the camera observes the aerial traffic before tilting back down toward the street.

events.description: returns to street level sidewalk with neon storefronts and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past various neon-lit storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: row of commercial entrances with glowing neon signs and advertisements
vertical digital billboards displaying colorful product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to street level, walking along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with neon-lit storefronts and advertising panels. A pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction as the camera continues past various commercial displays and street furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked street intersection up toward a towering cyberpunk skyline before returning to the urban sidewalk. It begins by moving across a wet crosswalk beneath the red neon glow of the BD SHACK building, with the ground reflecting vibrant city lights as the camera approaches a massive elevated highway. As the camera passes beneath the highway's deep shadows and neon underglow, the perspective tilts upward to reveal a dense forest of skyscrapers adorned with glowing advertisements. This upward gaze expands to capture flying vehicles navigating between the towers and a blue Japanese hotel sign before the camera tilts back down toward the ground. The scene finally settles back at street level, gliding along a wet concrete sidewalk past neon storefronts and a passing pedestrian.
